name: Spanish Bakes Rice
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 275 degrees F. Heat shortening in a heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add rice and cook, stirring frequently, for 3-4 minutes or until the rice begins to brown. Add onion and sauté for 2 minutes or until the onion softens. Add cumin, tomato, chicken base, salt, and water. Stir well to dissolve the chicken base. Bring to a boil, pour into a 2-quart casserole dish, cover tightly, and bake for 1 hour.
